## Summary

## Testing

## Compatibility and licensing checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the observable behavior change.
- [ ] Public API or migration documentation is updated.
- [ ] No new private Ray API is used, or it is isolated and compatibility-tested.
- [ ] New source/configuration files include the Apache-2.0 SPDX header.
- [ ] The contribution contains no credentials, private endpoints, or proprietary data.
- [ ] Commits include `Signed-off-by` lines (DCO).
